name: ames-imagerelay
description: Image Relay MCP connector for digital asset management, files, folders, collections, products, metadata, upload links, and webhooks.

interface.shortDescription: Connect Claude and Codex to Image Relay DAM.
interface.longDescription: An Image Relay MCP connector for browsing, searching, uploading, organizing, and administering digital assets through the Image Relay API. Requires IMAGERELAY_API_KEY; IMAGERELAY_SUBDOMAIN is optional.
defaultPrompt: Search Image Relay for campaign assets.
